(** ** Preamble *)

(** Settings *)

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

(** Imports *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.RigsAndRings.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.

(** ** The standard function from the natural numbers to a monoid *)

Fixpoint natmult {X : monoid} (n : nat) (x : X) : X :=
  match n with
    | O => 0%addmonoid
    | S O => x
    | S m => (x + natmult m x)%addmonoid
  end.
Definition nattorig {X : rig} (n : nat) : X :=
  natmult (X := rigaddabmonoid X) n 1%rig.
Definition nattoring {X : ring} (n : nat) : X :=
  nattorig (X := ringtorig X) n.


∏ (X : monoid) (n : nat) (x : X),
natmult (S n) x = (x * natmult n x)%multoperation


∏ (X : monoid) (n : nat) (x : X),
natmult (S n) x = (x * natmult n x)%multoperation

  
X: monoid
n: nat
x: X
natmult (S n) x = (x * natmult n x)%multoperation

  
X: monoid
x: X
natmult 1 x = (x * natmult 0 x)%multoperation
X: monoid
n: nat
x: X
IHn: natmult (S n) x = (x * natmult n x)%multoperation
natmult (S (S n)) x =
(x * natmult (S n) x)%multoperation

  
X: monoid
x: X
natmult 1 x = (x * natmult 0 x)%multoperation
 now rewrite runax.
  
X: monoid
n: nat
x: X
IHn: natmult (S n) x = (x * natmult n x)%multoperation
natmult (S (S n)) x =
(x * natmult (S n) x)%multoperation
 reflexivity.
Qed.

X: rig
∏ n : nat, nattorig (S n) = (1%rig + nattorig n)%ring


X: rig
∏ n : nat, nattorig (S n) = (1%rig + nattorig n)%ring

  
X: rig
n: nat
nattorig (S n) = (1%rig + nattorig n)%ring

  now apply (natmultS (X := rigaddabmonoid X)).
Qed.


∏ (X : rig) (n : nat) (x : X),
(nattorig n * x)%ring = natmult n x


∏ (X : rig) (n : nat) (x : X),
(nattorig n * x)%ring = natmult n x

  
X: rig
n: nat
x: X
(nattorig n * x)%ring = natmult n x

  
X: rig
x: X
(nattorig 0 * x)%ring = natmult 0 x
X: rig
n: nat
x: X
IHn: (nattorig n * x)%ring = natmult n x
(nattorig (S n) * x)%ring = natmult (S n) x

  
X: rig
x: X
(nattorig 0 * x)%ring = natmult 0 x
 now apply rigmult0x.
  
X: rig
n: nat
x: X
IHn: (nattorig n * x)%ring = natmult n x
(nattorig (S n) * x)%ring = natmult (S n) x
 
X: rig
n: nat
x: X
IHn: (nattorig n * x)%ring = natmult n x
((1%rig + nattorig n) * x)%ring =
(x * natmult n x)%multoperation

    now rewrite rigrdistr, IHn, riglunax2.
Qed.

∏ (X : monoid) (n m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n + m) x =
(natmult n x * natmult m x)%multoperation


∏ (X : monoid) (n m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n + m) x =
(natmult n x * natmult m x)%multoperation

x: X

(natmult (S n) x * natmult m x)%multoperation

x: X
natmult (0 + m) x =
(natmult 0 x * natmult m x)%multoperation
 
X: monoid
m: nat
x: X
natmult (0 + m) x = natmult m x

    reflexivity.
  
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n + m) x = (natmult n x * natmult m x)%multoperation
m: nat
x: X

n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n + m) x = (natmult n x * natmult m x)%multoperation
m: nat
x: X
natmult (S (n + m)) x =
(natmult (S n) x * natmult m x)%multoperation

n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n + m) x = (natmult n x * natmult m x)%multoperation
m: nat
x: X
(x * (natmult n x * natmult m x))%multoperation =
(x * (natmult n x * natmult m x))%multoperation

    reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ (X : rig) (n m : nat),
(nattorig (n + m) : X) =
(nattorig n + nattorig m)%ring


∏ (X : rig) (n m : nat),
(nattorig (n + m) : X) =
(nattorig n + nattorig m)%ring

  
X: rig
n, m: nat
(nattorig (n + m) : X) =
(nattorig n + nattorig m)%ring

  apply (natmult_plus (X := rigaddabmonoid X)).
Qed.


∏ (X : monoid) (n m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)


∏ (X : monoid) (n m : nat) (x : X),
natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)

  
X: monoid
m: nat
x: X
natmult (0 * m) x = natmult 0 (natmult m x)
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
natmult (S n * m) x = natmult (S n) (natmult m x)

  
X: monoid
m: nat
x: X
natmult (0 * m) x = natmult 0 (natmult m x)
 reflexivity.
  
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
natmult (S n * m) x = natmult (S n) (natmult m x)
 
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
natmult (n * m + m) x = natmult (S n) (natmult m x)

    
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
S n = n + 1
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
H: S n = n + 1
natmult (n * m + m) x = natmult (S n) (natmult m x)

    
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
S n = n + 1
 
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
S n = S n

      reflexivity. 
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
H: S n = n + 1
natmult (n * m + m) x = natmult (S n) (natmult m x)

    
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
natmult (n * m + m) x = natmult (n + 1) (natmult m x)

    
X: monoid
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (m : nat) (x : X), natmult (n * m) x = natmult n (natmult m x)
m: nat
x: X
(natmult n (natmult m x) * natmult m x)%multoperation =
(natmult n (natmult m x) * natmult 1 (natmult m x))%multoperation

    reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ (X : rig) (n m : nat),
(nattorig (n * m) : X) =
(nattorig n * nattorig m)%ring


∏ (X : rig) (n m : nat),
(nattorig (n * m) : X) =
(nattorig n * nattorig m)%ring

  
X: rig
n, m: nat
(nattorig (n * m) : X) =
(nattorig n * nattorig m)%ring

  
X: rig
n, m: nat
natmult (n * m) 1%rig =
(natmult n 1%rig * natmult m 1%rig)%ring

  
X: rig
n, m: nat
(nattorig n * natmult m 1%rig)%ring =
(natmult n 1%rig * natmult m 1%rig)%ring

  reflexivity.
Qed.


X: monoid
∏ (n : nat) (x y : X),
(x * y)%multoperation = (y * x)%multoperation
→ natmult n (x * y)%multoperation =
  (natmult n x * natmult n y)%multoperation


X: monoid
∏ (n : nat) (x y : X),
(x * y)%multoperation = (y * x)%multoperation
→ natmult n (x * y)%multoperation =
  (natmult n x * natmult n y)%multoperation

x, y: X

natmult n (x * y)%multoperation =
(natmult n x * natmult n y)%multoperation

x, y: X

x, y: X
X0: (x * y)%multoperation = (y * x)%multoperation
natmult 0 (x * y)%multoperation = natmult 0 y

n: nat

(x * (y * natmult n x * natmult n y))%multoperation =

x, y: X

istrans R
→ isbinophrel R
  → ∏ (n : nat) (x y : X),
    R x y → R (natmult (S n) x) (natmult (S n) y)

R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
n: nat
x, y: X
H: R x y
IHn: R (natmult (S n) x) (natmult (S n) y)
R x y

  exact H.
Qed.

(** ** relation  *)

Definition setquot_aux {X : monoid} (R : hrel X) : hrel X :=
  λ x y : X, ∃ c : X, R (x + c)%addmonoid (y + c)%addmonoid.


X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
istrans R → isbinophrel R → istrans (setquot_aux R)


X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
istrans R → isbinophrel R → istrans (setquot_aux R)

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
istrans (setquot_aux R)

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z: X
setquot_aux R x y
→ setquot_aux R y z → setquot_aux R x z

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z: X
(∑ c : X,
 R (x * c)%multoperation (y * c)%multoperation)
→ (∑ c : X,
   R (y * c)%multoperation (z * c)%multoperation)
  → ∑ c : X,
    R (x * c)%multoperation (z * c)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z, c1: X
Hc1: R (x * c1)%multoperation (y * c1)%multoperation
c2: X
Hc2: R (y * c2)%multoperation (z * c2)%multoperation
∑ c : X, R (x * c)%multoperation (z * c)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z, c1: X
Hc1: R (x * c1)%multoperation (y * c1)%multoperation
c2: X
Hc2: R (y * c2)%multoperation (z * c2)%multoperation
R (x * (c1 * c2))%multoperation
  (z * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid

Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R

c2: X
Hc2: R (y * c2)%multoperation (z * c2)%multoperation
R (x * (c1 * c2))%multoperation ?x2

Hop: isbinophrel R

R (?b * c2)%multoperation
  (z * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

R: hrel X

Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z, c1: X

c2: X

  (z * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z, c1: X
Hc1: R (x * c1)%multoperation (y * c1)%multoperation
c2: X
Hc2: R (y * c2)%multoperation (z * c2)%multoperation
R (y * c2 * c1)%multoperation
  (z * c2 * c1)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: istrans R
Hop: isbinophrel R
x, y, z, c1: X
Hc1: R (x * c1)%multoperation (y * c1)%multoperation
c2: X
Hc2: R (y * c2)%multoperation (z * c2)%multoperation
R (y * c2)%multoperation (z * c2)%multoperation

  exact Hc2.
Qed.

isbinophrel R → isbinophrel (setquot_aux R)

R: hrel X

isbinophrel (setquot_aux R)

R: hrel X

setquot_aux R a b
→ setquot_aux R (c * a)%multoperation
    (c * b)%multoperation

(** ** Archimedean property in a monoid *)

Definition isarchmonoid {X : abmonoid} (R : hrel X) :=
  ∏ x y1 y2 : X,
    R y1 y2 →
    (∃ n : nat, R (natmult n y1 + x)%addmonoid (natmult n y2))
      × (∃ n : nat, R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 + x)%addmonoid).

Definition isarchmonoid_1 {X : abmonoid} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchmonoid R →
  ∏ x y1 y2 : X,
    R y1 y2 →
    ∃ n : nat, R (natmult n y1 + x)%addmonoid (natmult n y2) :=
  λ H x y1 y2 Hy, (pr1 (H x y1 y2 Hy)).
Definition isarchmonoid_2 {X : abmonoid} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchmonoid R →
  ∏ x y1 y2 : X,
    R y1 y2 →
    ∃ n : nat, R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 + x)%addmonoid :=
  λ H x y1 y2 Hy, (pr2 (H x y1 y2 Hy)).

(** ** Archimedean property in a group *)

Definition isarchgr {X : abgr} (R : hrel X) :=
  ∏ x y1 y2 : X,
    R y1 y2 →
    ∃ n : nat, R (natmult n y1 + x)%addmonoid (natmult n y2).


X: abgr
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R
→ ∏ (n : nat) (x y1 y2 : X),
  R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)
  → R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation


X: abgr
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R
→ ∏ (n : nat) (x y1 y2 : X),
  R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)
  → R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

  
X: abgr
R: hrel X
Hop: isbinophrel R
∏ (n : nat) (x y1 y2 : X),
R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)
→ R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

  
X: abgr
R: hrel X
Hop: isbinophrel R
n: nat
x, y1, y2: X
Hy: R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)
R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

  
X: abgr
R: hrel X
Hop: isbinophrel R
n: nat
x, y1, y2: X
Hy: R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)
R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr
  ((natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation - x)%abgr

  
X: abgr
R: hrel X
Hop: isbinophrel R
n: nat
x, y1, y2: X
Hy: R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)
R (natmult n y1 - x)%abgr (natmult n y2)

  exact Hy.
Qed.

× (∃ n : nat,

X: abgr
R: hrel X
isarchmonoid R → isarchgr R


X: abgr
R: hrel X
isarchmonoid R → isarchgr R

  
X: abgr
R: hrel X
H: isarchmonoid R
x, y1, y2: X
Hy: R y1 y2
∃ n : nat,
R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2)

  apply (isarchmonoid_1 _ H x y1 y2 Hy).
Defined.



X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y2))


X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

R: hrel X

Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
 
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
n: nat
y: abmonoiddirprod X X

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
y: abmonoiddirprod X X
natmult 0 (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult 0 (pr1 y),, natmult 0 (pr2 y))
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
n: nat
y: abmonoiddirprod X X
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
natmult (S n) (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult (S n) (pr1 y),, natmult (S n) (pr2 y))

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
n: nat
y: abmonoiddirprod X X
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
natmult (S n) (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult (S n) (pr1 y),, natmult (S n) (pr2 y))

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
n: nat
y: abmonoiddirprod X X
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
(setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y *
 setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
   (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y)))%multoperation =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  ((pr1 y * natmult n (pr1 y))%multoperation,,
   (pr2 y * natmult n (pr2 y))%multoperation)

    reflexivity. 
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2)
     (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1: nat
Hn1: setquot_aux R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: nat
Hn2: setquot_aux R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
     (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1),,
      natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1)) *
   setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
     (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2),,
      natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2)))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
→ setquot_aux R
    (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
    (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
  → abgrdiffrel X Hr
      (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
         (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1),,
          natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1)) *
       setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
      (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
         (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2),,
          natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2)))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
(∑ c : pr1 X,
 R
   (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c)%multoperation
   (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c)%multoperation)
→ (∑ c : pr1 X,
   R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c)%multoperation
     (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c)%multoperation)
  → ∑ c0 : pr1 X,
    R
      (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
       natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * c0)%multoperation
      (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
       (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * c0)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
∑ c0 : pr1 X,
R
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
   natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * c0)%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * c0)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
   natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))

c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
   natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation
  ?x2
X: abmonoid

y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X

H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X

(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation

R ?x2

Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
 natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation

 (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
R

   natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation
  ?x2

Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
 natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
 
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y1) *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) *
  (pr1 x *
   (natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
    (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y1) *
 (natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
  (pr1 x *
   (c1 *
    (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2))))))%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation

Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =

X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y1) *
 (pr1 x *
  (natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
   (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2)))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
 (pr1 x *
  (c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2)))))%multoperation

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation

R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 x *
 (natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
  (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) *
   (c1 * (c2 * natmult n2 (pr1 y1))))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
 (pr1 x *
  (c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2)))))%multoperation

c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =

R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
 (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) *
  (c1 * (c2 * (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * pr1 x)))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr2 y2) *
 (pr1 x *
  (c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2)))))%multoperation

(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =

R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr2 y2) *
 (c1 * (c2 * (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * pr1 x))))%multoperation =
(pr1 x *
 (c1 *
  (natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2))))%multoperation

Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X

natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n2 (pr1 y1) * (natmult n2 (pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation

Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R

natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =

(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))

c2: pr1 X

X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation =
(pr2 y2 * pr1 y1)%multoperation

    apply commax. 
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
X0: (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
 natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
R
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
   natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation
  ?x2
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R ?x2
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
X0: (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
 natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
R
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y1) * pr1 x *
   natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y2) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation
  ?x2

R: hrel X

Hr': istrans R

X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  ?x2
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R ?x2
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
  ?b
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (?b * (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2))%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
X0: (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2))%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2))%multoperation
 
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y2) *
  (natmult n1 (pr2 y1) *
   (natmult n2 (pr2 y1) * (pr2 x * (c1 * c2))))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult n1 (pr2 y1) *
  (c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y2) *
    (natmult n2 (pr2 y1) * (pr2 x * c2))))))%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation =
(pr2 y1 * pr1 y2)%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation =
(pr2 y1 * pr1 y2)%multoperation

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult n1 (pr2 y1) *
  (natmult n2 (pr2 y1) * (pr2 x * (c1 * c2)))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr2 y1) *
 (c1 *
  (natmult n2 (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult n2 (pr2 y1) * (pr2 x * c2)))))%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation =
(pr2 y1 * pr1 y2)%multoperation
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation =
(pr2 y1 * pr1 y2)%multoperation

    
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr2 y1) *
 (natmult n2 (pr2 y1) *
  (pr2 x * (c1 * (c2 * natmult n2 (pr1 y2))))))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr2 y1) *
 (c1 *
  (natmult n2 (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult n2 (pr2 y1) * (pr2 x * c2)))))%multoperation

(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation

(pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation =

y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X

natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X

  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation

    apply commax. 
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
X0: (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2))%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
X0: (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
 (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation =
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
 (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2))%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr1 y2) *
   (natmult (n1 + n2) (pr2 y1) * pr2 x) * (c1 * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2))%multoperation
  (natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1 *
   (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2))%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
y1, y2, x: abmonoiddirprod X X
n1, n2: nat
H0: ∏ (n : nat) (y : abmonoiddirprod X X),
natmult n (setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X) y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrelabgrdiff X)
  (natmult n (pr1 y),, natmult n (pr2 y))
c1: pr1 X
Hc1: R (natmult n1 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x * c1)%multoperation
(natmult n1 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * c1)%multoperation
c2: pr1 X
Hc2: R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
(natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation
R (natmult n2 (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * c2)%multoperation
  (natmult n2 (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x * c2)%multoperation

  apply Hc2.
Qed.

X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
istrans R
→ isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
  → isarchgr (abgrdiffrel X Hr)


X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
istrans R
→ isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
  → isarchgr (abgrdiffrel X Hr)

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
isarchgr (abgrdiffrel X Hr)

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: setquot (eqrelabgrdiff X)
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (abgrdiffrel X Hr y1 y2
   → ∃ n : nat,
     abgrdiffrel X Hr (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation
       (natmult n y2))
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
∏ x x' x'' : abmonoiddirprod X X,
(λ x0 y1 y2 : setquot (eqrelabgrdiff X),
 (abgrdiffrel X Hr y1 y2
  → ∃ n : nat,
    abgrdiffrel X Hr (natmult n y1 * x0)%multoperation
      (natmult n y2)),, ?pr2@{x:=x0})
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x')
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x'')

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
∏ x x' x'' : abmonoiddirprod X X,
(λ x0 y1 y2 : setquot (eqrelabgrdiff X),
 (abgrdiffrel X Hr y1 y2
  → ∃ n : nat,
    abgrdiffrel X Hr (natmult n y1 * x0)%multoperation
      (natmult n y2)),,
 isarchabgrdiff_subproof X R Hr x0 y1 y2)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x')
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x'')

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
∃ n : nat,
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
?X
→ ?Y
  → ∑ n : nat,
    abgrdiffrel X Hr
      (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
       setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
      (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2))
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
∥ ?X ∥
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
∥ ?Y ∥

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
(∑ n : nat,
 setquot_aux R
   (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
   (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation))
→ ?Y
  → ∑ n : nat,
    abgrdiffrel X Hr
      (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
       setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
      (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2))
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
∥ ?Y ∥

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
(∑ n : nat,
 setquot_aux R
   (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
   (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation))
→ (∑ n : nat,
   setquot_aux R
     (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
     (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation)
  → ∑ n : nat,
    abgrdiffrel X Hr
      (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
       setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
      (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
∑ n : nat,
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
abgrdiffrel X Hr
  (natmult (pr1 n1 + pr1 n2)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1) *
   setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) x)%multoperation
  (natmult (pr1 n1 + pr1 n2)
     (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2))

Hr': istrans R

x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X

  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
istrans R
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
setquot_aux R
  (natmult (pr1 n1) (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult (pr1 n1) (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
setquot_aux R
  (natmult (pr1 n2) (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult (pr1 n2) (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
setquot_aux R
  (natmult (pr1 n1) (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult (pr1 n1) (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
setquot_aux R
  (natmult (pr1 n2) (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult (pr1 n2) (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation

  
X: abmonoid
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
Hr': istrans R
H: isarchmonoid (setquot_aux R)
x, y1, y2: abmonoiddirprod X X
Hy: abgrdiffrel X Hr (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y1)
  (setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff X) y2)
n1: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2) * pr1 x)%multoperation
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1)%multoperation)
n2: ∑ n : nat,
setquot_aux R
  (natmult n (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult n (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation
setquot_aux R
  (natmult (pr1 n2) (pr1 y1 * pr2 y2)%multoperation)
  (natmult (pr1 n2) (pr1 y2 * pr2 y1) * pr2 x)%multoperation

  exact (pr2 n2).
Defined.

(** ** Archimedean property in a rig *)

Definition isarchrig {X : rig} (R : hrel X) :=
  (∏ y1 y2 : X, R y1 y2 → ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n * y1)%rig (1 + nattorig n * y2)%rig)
    × (∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n) x)
    × (∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%rig 0%rig).

Definition isarchrig_diff {X : rig} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchrig R →
  ∏ y1 y2 : X, R y1 y2 → ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n * y1)%rig (1 + nattorig n * y2)%rig :=
  pr1.
Definition isarchrig_gt {X : rig} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchrig R →
  ∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n) x :=
  λ H, (pr1 (pr2 H)).
Definition isarchrig_pos {X : rig} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchrig R →
  ∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%rig 0%rig :=

  λ H, (pr2 (pr2 H)).


X: rig
R: hrel X
isinvbinophrel R
→ isarchrig R → isarchrig (setquot_aux R)


X: rig
R: hrel X
isinvbinophrel R
→ isarchrig R → isarchrig (setquot_aux R)

R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
isarchrig (setquot_aux R)

R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
∏ y1 y2 : X,
setquot_aux R y1 y2
→ ∃ n : nat,
  setquot_aux R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, setquot_aux R (nattorig n) x

y1, y2: X
(∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
 R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation)
→ ∃ n : nat,
  setquot_aux R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation
∃ n : nat,

R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation
n: ∑ n : nat,

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
y1, y2: X
Hy: ∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation
n: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
setquot_aux R (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
y1, y2: X
Hy: ∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation
n: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
R ((nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring * c)%multoperation
  ((1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring * c)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
y1, y2: X
Hy: ∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation
n: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
R ((nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring * 0%rig)%multoperation
  ((1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring * 0%rig)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
y1, y2: X
Hy: ∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
R (y1 * c)%multoperation (y2 * c)%multoperation
n: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
R (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring

    exact (pr2 n).

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
∑ n : nat, setquot_aux R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
setquot_aux R (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring 0%rig

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
∑ c : rigaddabmonoid X,
R ((nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring * c)%multoperation
  (0%rig * c)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
R ((nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring * 0%rig)%multoperation
  (0%rig * 0%rig)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr: isinvbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
R (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring 0%rig

    exact (pr2 n).
Qed.


X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (nattorig m * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig m * y2)%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
R (natmult (max 1 n * m) y1 * x)%multoperation
  (natmult (max 1 n * m) y2)

  (natmult (max 1 n * m) y2)

R
  (natmult (S n * m) y2 * (natmult (S n) 1%rig * x))%multoperation
  (natmult (S n * m) y2 * 0%addmonoid)%multoperation

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat

n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig (S n) + x)%ring 0%rig
(natmult m y2 * 1%rig)%multoperation =
(1%rig * natmult m y2)%multoperation

(1%rig * natmult m y2)%multoperation

    apply rigcomm1.
Qed.

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (nattorig m * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig m * y2)%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig n) x
R (natmult (max 1 n * m) y1)
  (natmult (max 1 n * m) y2 * x)%multoperation

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
Hn: R (nattorig 0) x
R ?x2 (natmult (max 1 0 * m) y2 * x)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
Hn: R (nattorig 0) x
R (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
  (natmult (max 1 0 * m) y2 * x)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
Hn: R (nattorig 0) x
R (natmult m y2 + 1%rig)%ring
  (natmult (max 1 0 * m) y2 * x)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
Hn: R (nattorig 0) x
R 1%rig x

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
Hn: R (nattorig 0) x
R 1%rig ?x2

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
Hn: R (nattorig 0) x
R 0%rig x

    exact Hn.
  
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig (S n)) x
R (natmult (max 1 (S n) * m) y1)
  (natmult (max 1 (S n) * m) y2 * x)%multoperation

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X

n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig (S n)) x
R (natmult (max 1 (S n)) (natmult m y1))
  (natmult (max 1 (S n) * m) y2 * x)%multoperation

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig (S n)) x
R
  (natmult (S n * m) y2 * natmult (S n) 1%rig)%multoperation
  (natmult (max 1 (S n) * m) y2 * x)%multoperation
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig (S n)) x
(natmult m y2 * 1%rig)%multoperation =
(1%rig * natmult m y2)%multoperation

Hr: istrans R

n: nat

R (natmult (S n) 1%rig) x

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X

n: nat

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
m: nat
Hm: R (natmult m y1) (1%rig + natmult m y2)%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig (S n)) x
(natmult m y2 * 1%rig)%multoperation =
(1%rig * natmult m y2)%multoperation

    apply rigcomm1.
Qed.

X: rig
R: hrel X
R 1%rig 0%rig
→ istrans R
  → isbinophrel R → isarchrig R → isarchmonoid R


X: rig
R: hrel X
R 1%rig 0%rig
→ istrans R
  → isbinophrel R → isarchrig R → isarchmonoid R

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
(∃ n : nat,
 R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2))
× (∃ n : nat,
   R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation)

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
∃ n : nat,
R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2)

R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
∃ n : nat,
R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

  
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2

R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2)
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
(∃ n : nat,
 R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
   (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring)
→ (∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig)
  → ∃ n : nat,
    R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2)

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
(∑ n : nat,
 R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
   (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring)
→ (∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig)
  → ∑ n : nat,
    R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2)

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
m: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
∑ n : nat,
R (natmult n y1 * x)%multoperation (natmult n y2)

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
m: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
R
  (natmult (max 1 (pr1 n) * pr1 m) y1 * x)%multoperation
  (natmult (max 1 (pr1 n) * pr1 m) y2)

X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
m: ∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
R (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring 0%rig

    exact (pr2 n).
  
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
∃ n : nat,
R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation
 
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
(∃ n : nat,
 R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
   (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring)
→ (∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n) x)
  → ∃ n : nat,
    R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

    
X: rig
R: hrel X
Hr1: R 1%rig 0%rig
Hr: istrans R
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
x, y1, y2: rigaddabmonoid X
Hy: R y1 y2
(∑ n : nat,
 R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
   (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring)
→ (∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n) x)
  → ∑ n : nat,
    R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattorig n) x
∑ n : nat,
R (natmult n y1) (natmult n y2 * x)%multoperation

  (natmult (max 1 (pr1 n) * pr1 m) y2 * x)%multoperation

H: isarchmonoid R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat,
R (natmult n 1%rig)
  (natmult n 0%rig * x)%multoperation
R (nattorig (pr1 n)) x

    abstract (
        pattern x at 1;
        rewrite <- (riglunax1 X x) ;
        pattern (0%rig : X) at 1;
        rewrite <- (rigmultx0 X (nattorig (pr1 n))) ;
        rewrite nattorig_natmult ;
        exact (pr2 n)).

→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

x: X
n: ∑ n : nat,
R (natmult n 1%rig * x)%multoperation
  (natmult n 0%rig)
R (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring 0%rig

    abstract (
        pattern (0%rig : X) at 1;
        rewrite <- (rigmultx0 X (nattorig (pr1 n))), nattorig_natmult ;
        exact (pr2 n)).
Defined.

(** ** Archimedean property in a ring *)

Definition isarchring {X : ring} (R : hrel X) :=
  (∏ x : X, R x 0%ring → ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring)
    × (∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x).

Definition isarchring_1 {X : ring} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchring R →
  ∏ x : X, R x 0%ring → ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring := pr1.
Definition isarchring_2 {X : ring} (R : hrel X) :
  isarchring R →
  ∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x := pr2.


X: ring
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R → isarchring R → isarchrig R

→ ∃ n : nat,

    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

→ ∃ n : nat,

n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * (y1 - y2))%ring 1%ring
∑ n : nat,
R (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

    
X: ring
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
H: isarchring R
y1, y2: X
Hy: R y1 y2
X0: R (y1 - y2)%ring 0%ring
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * (y1 - y2))%ring 1%ring
R (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring

    abstract
      (rewrite <- (ringrunax1 _ (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring), <- (ringlinvax1 _ (nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring), <- ringassoc1 ;
        apply (pr2 Hop1) ;
        rewrite <- ringrmultminus, <- ringldistr ;
        exact (pr2 n)).

H: isarchring R
x: X
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (- x)%ring
R (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring 0%rig

    abstract (change 0%rig with (0%ring : X) ;
               rewrite <- (ringlinvax1 _ x) ;
               apply (pr2 Hop1) ;
               exact (pr2 n)).
Defined.

R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattorig n * x)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * 0)%ring
R (nattoring n * x)%ring (1 + nattoring n * 0)%ring

    exact Hn.

Hr: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x
 
X: ring
R: hrel X
Hr: isbinophrel R
H: isarchrig R
isarchrig R

    exact H.
Defined.

  istrans R

    → isarchring (rigtoringrel X Hadd)

R: hrel X
