isarchrig (setquot_aux R)

  exact Harch.
(* Proof without (Hr : R 1%rig 0%rig)
  split.
  - intros xx Hx0.
    generalize (pr1 (pr2 xx)).
    apply hinhuniv ; intros (x,Hx).
    rewrite <- (setquotl0 _ xx (x,,Hx)) in Hx0 |- * ; simpl pr1 in Hx0 |- * ; clear xx Hx.
    eapply hinhfun.
    2: apply (isarchrig_diff _ Harch (pr1 x) (pr2 x)).
    intros (n,Hn).
    exists n.
    assert ((nattoring (X := rigtoring X) n * setquotpr
    (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) x)%ring = (setquotpr
    (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) (nattorig n * pr1 x ,,
    nattorig n * pr2 x))%ring).
    { clear.
      induction n as [|n IHn].
      - rewrite !rigmult0x, ringmult0x.
        reflexivity.
      - unfold nattoring.
        rewrite !nattorigS, !rigrdistr, ringrdistr, !riglunax2, ringlunax2.
        simpl.
        eapply pathscomp0.
        apply maponpaths.
        apply IHn.
        reflexivity. }
    rewrite X0 ; clear X0.
    revert Hn.
    apply hinhfun ; simpl.
    intros (c,Hc).
    exists c.
    rewrite rigrunax1.
    exact Hc.
    revert Hx0.
    apply hinhfun ; simpl.
    intros (c,Hc).
    exists c.
    rewrite riglunax1, rigrunax1 in Hc.
    exact Hc.
  - intros xx.
    generalize (pr1 (pr2 xx)).
    apply hinhuniv ; intros (x,Hx).
    rewrite <- (setquotl0 _ xx (x,,Hx)) ; simpl pr1 ; clear xx Hx.
    generalize (isarchrig_gt _ Harch (pr1 x)) (isarchrig_pos _ Harch (pr2 x)).
    apply hinhfun2.
    intros (n1,Hn1) (n2,Hn2).
    exists (n1 + n2)%nat.
    revert Hn1 Hn2.
    assert (nattoring (X := rigtoring X) (n1 + n2) = setquotpr
    (binopeqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid X)) (nattorig (n1 + n2) ,,
    0%rig)).
    { generalize (n1 + n2) ; clear.
      induction n as [|n IHn].
      - reflexivity.
      - unfold nattoring ; rewrite !nattorigS.
        rewrite <- (riglunax1 _ 0%rig).
        eapply pathscomp0.
        apply maponpaths.
        exact IHn.
        reflexivity. }
    rewrite X0 ; clear X0.
    apply hinhfun2 ; simpl.
    intros (c1,Hc1) (c2,Hc2).
    exists (c1+c2)%rig.
    eapply Htra.
    assert (nattorig (n1 + n2) + pr2 x + (c1 + c2) =
            ((nattorig n1 + c1) + (nattorig n2 + pr2 x + c2)))%rig.
    { rewrite nattorig_plus, !rigassoc1.
      apply maponpaths.
      rewrite rigcomm1, !rigassoc1.
      rewrite rigcomm1, !rigassoc1.
      apply maponpaths.
      rewrite rigcomm1, !rigassoc1.
      reflexivity. }
    simpl in X0 |- * ; rewrite X0 ; clear X0.
    apply (pr2 Hadd).
    exact Hc1.
    rewrite rigrunax1, <- rigassoc1.
    apply (pr1 Hadd).
    rewrite riglunax1 in Hc2.
    exact Hc2.*)
Defined.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
∏ (n : nat) (x : X × S),
natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
∏ (n : nat) (x : X × S),
natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
natmult 0 (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult 0 (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
natmult (Preamble.S n)
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult (Preamble.S n) (pr1 x),, pr2 x)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
natmult 0 (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult 0 (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
eqrelcommringfrac X S (commringfracunel1int X S)
  (natmult 0 (pr1 x),, pr2 x)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
∑ a0 : pr1 S,
(0 * pr12 x * pr1 a0)%ring =
(0%addmonoid * 0%addmonoid * pr1 a0)%ring

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
(0 * pr12 x * pr12 x)%ring =
(0%addmonoid * 0%addmonoid * pr12 x)%ring

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
0%ring = 0%ring

    reflexivity.
  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
natmult (Preamble.S n)
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  (natmult (Preamble.S n) (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
(setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x *
 setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
   (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x))%multoperation =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
  ((pr1 x * natmult n (pr1 x))%multoperation,, pr2 x)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
eqrelcommringfrac X S
  (commringfracop1int X S
     (pr11 (invweq
              (weqsubtypesdirprod
                 (pr11 (make_dirprod
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
                             (natmult n (pr1 x),,
                              pr2 x))))
                 (pr12 (make_dirprod
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
                             (natmult n (pr1 x),,
                              pr2 x)))))
              (make_dirprod
                 (x,,
                  eqrelrefl (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
                 ((natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x),,
                  eqrelrefl (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
                    (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)))))
     (pr21 (invweq
              (weqsubtypesdirprod
                 (pr11 (make_dirprod
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
                             (natmult n (pr1 x),,
                              pr2 x))))
                 (pr12 (make_dirprod
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
                          (setquotpr
                             (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
                             (natmult n (pr1 x),,
                              pr2 x)))))
              (make_dirprod
                 (x,,
                  eqrelrefl (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
                 ((natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x),,
                  eqrelrefl (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
                    (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x))))))
  ((pr1 x * natmult n (pr1 x))%multoperation,, pr2 x)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
∑ a0 : pr1 S,
((pr12 x * pr1 x + pr12 x * natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 pr12 x * pr1 a0)%ring =
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x)) * pr1 a0)%ring

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
((pr12 x * pr1 x + pr12 x * natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 pr12 x * pr12 x)%ring =
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x)) * pr12 x)%ring

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
(pr12 x * (pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) * pr12 x *
 pr12 x)%ring =
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x)) * pr12 x)%ring

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) * pr12 x * pr12 x *
 pr12 x)%ring =
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x) *
  pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x)) * pr12 x)%ring

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
n: nat
x: pr1 X × pr1 S
IHn: natmult n (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) =
setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) (natmult n (pr1 x),, pr2 x)
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 (pr12 x * (pr12 x * pr12 x)))%ring =
((pr1 x + natmult n (pr1 x)) *
 (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x) *
  (pr1carrier (pr1 S) (pr2 x) * pr12 x)))%ring

    reflexivity.
Qed.


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
R 1%ring 0%ring
→ istrans R
  → isarchring R
    → isarchring (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs)


X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
R 1%ring 0%ring
→ istrans R
  → isarchring R
    → isarchring (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
isarchring (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs)

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : commringfrac X S,
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs x 0%ring
→ ∃ n : nat,
  commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
    (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : commringfrac X S,
∃ n : nat,
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs (nattoring n) x

  
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : commringfrac X S,
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs x 0%ring
→ ∃ n : nat,
  commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
    (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
s: setquot (pr1 (eqrelcommringfrac X S))
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs s 0%ring
   → ∃ n : nat,
     commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
       (nattoring n * s)%ring 1%ring)
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : X × S,
pr1
  ((λ H : setquot (pr1 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)),
    (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs H 0%ring
     → ∃ n : nat,
       commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
         (nattoring n * H)%ring 1%ring),, 
    ?pr2@{s:=H}) (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x))

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : X × S,
pr1
  ((λ H : setquot (pr1 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)),
    (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs H 0%ring
     → ∃ n : nat,
       commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
         (nattoring n * H)%ring 1%ring),,
    isapropimpl
      (commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs H 0%ring)
      (∃ n : nat,
       commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
         (nattoring n * H)%ring 1%ring)
      (propproperty
         (∃ n : nat,
          commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
            (nattoring n * H)%ring 1%ring)))
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x))

x: X × S
Hx: commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x) 0%ring
∃ n : nat,
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (nattoring n * setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)%ring
  1%ring

Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
c: S
Hx: R (pr1 x * pr1 c)%ring 0%ring
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * (pr1 x * pr1 c))%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n))
  (pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     ((nattoring (Preamble.S n * m) * pr1 x)%ring,,
      pr2 x)) 1%ring

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
c: S
Hx: R (pr1 x * pr1 c)%ring 0%ring
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * (pr1 x * pr1 c))%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n))
  (pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     ((nattorig (Preamble.S n * m) * pr1 x)%ring,,
      pr2 x)) 1%ring

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
c: S
Hx: R (pr1 x * pr1 c)%ring 0%ring
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * (pr1 x * pr1 c))%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n))
  (pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (natmult (Preamble.S n) (natmult m (pr1 x)),,
      pr2 x)) 1%ring

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
c: S
Hx: R (pr1 x * pr1 c)%ring 0%ring
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * (pr1 x * pr1 c))%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n))
  (pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring
∑ c0 : pr1 S,
R
  (match n with
   | 0%nat => natmult m (pr1 x)
   | S _ =>
       natmult m (pr1 x) +
       natmult n (natmult m (pr1 x))
   end * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c0)%ring
  (0%addmonoid * pr12 x * pr1 c0)%ring

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
c: S
Hx: R (pr1 x * pr1 c)%ring 0%ring
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * (pr1 x * pr1 c))%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n))
  (pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring
R
  (match n with
   | 0%nat => natmult m (pr1 x)
   | S _ =>
       natmult m (pr1 x) +
       natmult n (natmult m (pr1 x))
   end * 0%addmonoid * pr1 c)%ring
  (0%addmonoid * pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
c: S
Hx: R (pr1 x * pr1 c)%ring 0%ring
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * (pr1 x * pr1 c))%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n))
  (pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring
R
  (natmult (succ n) (natmult m (pr1 x)) * 1 * pr1 c)%ring
  (1 * pr12 x * pr1 c)%ring

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : commringfrac X S,
∃ n : nat,
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs (nattoring n) x
 
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
∏ x : X × S,
pr1
  ((λ c : setquot (pr1 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)),
    ∃ n : nat,
    commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs (nattoring n) c)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x))

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
pr1
  ((λ c : setquot (pr1 (eqrelcommringfrac X S)),
    ∃ n : nat,
    commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs (nattoring n) c)
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x))

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
(∑ n : nat,
 commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
   (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
      (nattoring n,, 0%addmonoid))
   (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x))
→ ∑ n : nat,
  commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs 
    (nattoring n)
    (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R

Hn: commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (nattoring n,, 0%addmonoid))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (natmult n
     (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
        (1%ring,, 0%addmonoid)))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (nattoring n,, 0%addmonoid))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (natmult n (pr1 (1%ring,, 0%addmonoid)),,
      pr2 (1%ring,, 0%addmonoid)))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
(∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * pr12 x)%ring 1%ring)
→ (∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (pr1 x))
  → ∃ n : nat,
    commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
      (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
         (nattoring n,, 0%addmonoid))
      (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
(∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * pr12 x)%ring 1%ring)
→ (∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (pr1 x))
  → ∑ n : nat,
    commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
      (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
         (nattoring n,, 0%addmonoid))
      (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * pr12 x)%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring n) (pr1 x)
∑ n : nat,
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (nattoring n,, 0%addmonoid))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

    
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * pr12 x)%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring n) (pr1 x)
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (nattoring (max 1 n * m),, 0%addmonoid))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

R: hrel X

Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
m: nat

Hn: R (nattoring 0) (pr1 x)
commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (nattoring (1 * m),, 0%addmonoid))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

commringfracgt X S Hop1 Hop2 Hs
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S)
     (nattoring (Preamble.S n * m),, 0%addmonoid))
  (setquotpr (eqrelcommringfrac X S) x)

R (nattorig (succ n * m) * pr12 x)%ring
  (pr1 x * 0%addmonoid)%ring

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * pr12 x)%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n)) (pr1 x)
R (natmult (succ n) (natmult m (pr12 x))) (pr1 x)

      
X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)

m: nat

n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n)) (pr1 x)
R (natmult (succ n) (natmult m (pr12 x))) ?x2

S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X

Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring

Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
m: nat

X: commring
S: subabmonoid (ringmultabmonoid X)
R: hrel X
Hop1: isbinophrel R
Hop2: isringmultgt X R
Hs: ∏ c : X, S c → R c 0%ring
H0: R 1%ring 0%ring
Htra: istrans R
Hr: isarchring R
x: X × S
m: nat
Hm: R (nattoring m * pr12 x)%ring 1%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring (Preamble.S n)) (pr1 x)
R (natmult (Preamble.S n) 1%ring) (pr1 x)

      exact Hn.
Qed.

(** ** Archimedean property in a field *)

Definition isarchfld {X : fld} (R : hrel X) :=
  ∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x.


X: fld
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R
→ isringmultgt X R
  → isirrefl R → isarchfld R → isarchring R


X: fld
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R
→ isringmultgt X R
  → isirrefl R → isarchfld R → isarchring R

  
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
isarchring R

  
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
∏ x : X,
R x 0%ring
→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x

  
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
∏ x : X,
R x 0%ring
→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
 
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

    
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': multinvpair X x
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': x = 0%ring
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

    
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': multinvpair X x
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
 
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': multinvpair X x
(∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (pr1 x'))
→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

      
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': multinvpair X x
(∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (pr1 x'))
→ ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

      
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': multinvpair X x
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (pr1 x')
∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

      
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': multinvpair X x
n: ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (pr1 x')
R (nattoring (pr1 n) * x)%ring 1%ring

      abstract (pattern (1%ring : X) at 1 ;
                 rewrite <- (pr1 (pr2 x')) ;
                apply (isringmultgttoisrringmultgt _ Hadd Hmult _ _ _ Hx (pr2 n))).
    
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': x = 0%ring
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
 
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': x = 0%ring
∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

      
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
x': x = 0%ring
R (nattoring 0 * x)%ring 1%ring

      abstract (apply fromempty ;
                 refine (Hirr _ _) ;
                 rewrite x' in Hx ;
                 apply Hx).
  
X: fld
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H: isarchfld R
∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x
 exact H.
Defined.

X: fld
R: hrel X
isarchring R → isarchfld R


X: fld
R: hrel X
isarchring R → isarchfld R

  
X: fld
R: hrel X
H: isarchring R
isarchfld R

  
X: fld
R: hrel X
H: isarchring R
x: X
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x

  apply (isarchring_2 R H x).
Defined.


X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
isarchring R
→ isarchfld (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)


X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
isarchring R
→ isarchfld (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
isarchfld (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
isarchring (fldfracgt X is is0 is1 is2 nc)

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
isarchring
  (λ a b : fldfrac X is,
   commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
isarchring
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
→ isarchring
    (λ a b : fldfrac X is,
     commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
       is1
       (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c),
        r) (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
       (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
X1: isarchring
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)
      (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
isarchring
  (λ a b : fldfrac X is,
   commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
X1: isarchring
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)
      (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
∏ (n : nat) (x : fldfrac X is),
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
X1: isarchring
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)
      (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
H_f: ∏ (n : nat) (x : fldfrac X is),
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring
isarchring
  (λ a b : fldfrac X is,
   commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
     is1
     (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc a)
     (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc b))

  
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
X1: isarchring
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)
      (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
∏ (n : nat) (x : fldfrac X is),
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
∏ (n : nat) (x : fldfrac X is),
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
n: nat
x: fldfrac X is
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
n: nat
x: fldfrac X is
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (nattorig n * x)%ring =
(nattorig n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
n: nat
x: fldfrac X is
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult n x) =
natmult n (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
x: fldfrac X is
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult 0 x) =
natmult 0 (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
n: nat
x: fldfrac X is
IHn: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult n x) =
natmult n (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult (S n) x) =
natmult (S n) (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)

    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
x: fldfrac X is
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult 0 x) =
natmult 0 (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
x: fldfrac X is
isirrefl R

      exact irr.
    
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
n: nat
x: fldfrac X is
IHn: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult n x) =
natmult n (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult (S n) x) =
natmult (S n) (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
 
X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
n: nat
x: fldfrac X is
IHn: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult n x) =
natmult n (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc
  (x * natmult n x)%multoperation =
(weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x *
 weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (natmult n x))%multoperation

  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)

weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (nattoring n * x)%ring =

  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)
      (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
H_f: ∏ (n : nat) (x : fldfrac X is),
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring
H_0: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc 0%ring = 0%ring
H_1: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc 1%ring = 1%ring

Hx: commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
  is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c),
   r) (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc 0%ring)
n: nat
Hn: commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
  is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c),
   r)
  (nattoring n *
   weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring
  1%ring

commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc

is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X

∏ x : fldfrac X is,
∃ n : nat,
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (nattoring n))
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)

  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)

X: intdom
is: isdeceq X
R: hrel X
is0: isbinophrel R
is1: isringmultgt X R
is2: R 1%ring 0%ring
nc: neqchoice R
irr: isirrefl R
tra: istrans R
X0: isarchring R
X1: isarchring
  (commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2)
     is0 is1
     (λ (c : X)
      (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r))
H_f: ∏ (n : nat) (x : fldfrac X is),
weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc (nattoring n * x)%ring =
(nattoring n * weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)%ring
H_0: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc 0%ring = 0%ring
H_1: weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc 1%ring = 1%ring
x: fldfrac X is
n: nat
Hn: commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0
  is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c),
   r) (nattoring n)
  (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)
commringfracgt X (ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2) is0 is1
  (λ (c : X) (r : ringpossubmonoid X is1 is2 c), r)
  (nattoring n) (weqfldfracgt_f X is is0 is1 is2 nc x)

    exact Hn.
Defined.

(** ** Archimedean property in a constructive field *)

Definition isarchCF {X : ConstructiveField} (R : hrel X) :=
  ∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x.


X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R
→ isringmultgt X R
  → isirrefl R
    → (∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF)
      → isarchCF R → isarchring R


X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
isbinophrel R
→ isringmultgt X R
  → isirrefl R
    → (∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF)
      → isarchCF R → isarchring R

  
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
isarchring R

  
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
∏ x : X,
R x 0%ring
→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x

R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
∏ x : X,
R x 0%ring
→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
 
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

    
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
(∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (CFinv x (H0 x Hx)))
→ ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

    
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
(∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n) (CFinv x (H0 x Hx)))
→ ∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

    
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring n) (CFinv x (H0 x Hx))
∑ n : nat, R (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring

Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R

H: isarchCF R
x: X
Hx: R x 0%ring
n: nat
Hn: R (nattoring n) (CFinv x (H0 x Hx))
R (nattoring n) (CFinv x (H0 x Hx))

    exact Hn.
  
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
Hadd: isbinophrel R
Hmult: isringmultgt X R
Hirr: isirrefl R
H0: ∏ x : X, R x 0%CF → (x ≠ 0)%CF
H: isarchCF R
∏ x : X, ∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x
 exact H.
Defined.

X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
isarchring R → isarchCF R


X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
isarchring R → isarchCF R

  
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
H: isarchring R
isarchCF R

  
X: ConstructiveField
R: hrel X
H: isarchring R
x: X
∃ n : nat, R (nattoring n) x

  apply (isarchring_2 R H x).
Defined.
